records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vYes. She and I
8v used to sit on that hill, taking in the view together.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vYes. She and I
8v used to sit on that hill, taking in the view together.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vYes. She and I
8v used to sit on that hill, taking in the view together.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
We'd picture this barren land
8v blooming with dreams people had built.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
We'd picture this barren land
8v blooming with dreams people had built.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
We'd picture this barren land
8v blooming with dreams people had built.

records.m_Talk_ENG: President! This is the heart of the Corrupted Area! We need to get out of here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: President! This is the heart of the Corrupted Area! We need to get out of here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: President! This is the heart of the Corrupted Area! We need to get out of here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you see it? The past we cherished.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you see it? The past we cherished.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you see it? The past we cherished.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's nothing but an illusion created by Corruption rays!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's nothing but an illusion created by Corruption rays!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's nothing but an illusion created by Corruption rays!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't get out, we'll be corrupted!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't get out, we'll be corrupted!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't get out, we'll be corrupted!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've lost all comms! Some kind of interference is jamming every signal!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've lost all comms! Some kind of interference is jamming every signal!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've lost all comms! Some kind of interference is jamming every signal!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
This
8v isn't something ordinary people can resist.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
This
8v isn't something ordinary people can resist.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
This
8v isn't something ordinary people can resist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So either we wait for salvation or accept the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So either we wait for salvation or accept the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So either we wait for salvation or accept the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Please don't give up. There must be a way out
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Please don't give up. There must be a way out
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Please don't give up. There must be a way out
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn, C.O.s?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn, C.O.s?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn, C.O.s?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
They're fast
8v Way too fast! We're surrounded.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
They're fast
8v Way too fast! We're surrounded.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
They're fast
8v Way too fast! We're surrounded.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Push through somehow! We have to get the President out of here
8v!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Push through somehow! We have to get the President out of here
8v!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Push through somehow! We have to get the President out of here
8v!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that a person?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that a person?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that a person?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a Counter! We're saved!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a Counter! We're saved!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a Counter! We're saved!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You're
8v? How did you get in here?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You're
8v? How did you get in here?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You're
8v? How did you get in here?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
With this much warping Corruption enough to bend time and pull in the past
8v It should've been impossible for even a Counter to breach.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
With this much warping Corruption enough to bend time and pull in the past
8v It should've been impossible for even a Counter to breach.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
With this much warping Corruption enough to bend time and pull in the past
8v It should've been impossible for even a Counter to breach.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I tried to explain, we'd be here all day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I tried to explain, we'd be here all day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I tried to explain, we'd be here all day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's get out of here first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's get out of here first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's get out of here first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's your affiliation? Did the Administration send you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's your affiliation? Did the Administration send you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's your affiliation? Did the Administration send you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not an official employee. I just overheard someone was trapped in the Vortex Scar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not an official employee. I just overheard someone was trapped in the Vortex Scar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not an official employee. I just overheard someone was trapped in the Vortex Scar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The C.O.s keep coming. Can you get us out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The C.O.s keep coming. Can you get us out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The C.O.s keep coming. Can you get us out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll lead. Don't fall behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll lead. Don't fall behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll lead. Don't fall behind.
